# Giuseppe Bonelli — Realism Tattoo Artist
> Giuseppe Bonelli is an Italian hyper-realism tattoo artist specializing in black & grey and color realism (portraits, wildlife, sacred/religious, architectural sleeves). He has tattooed professional footballers including Lautaro Martinez, Gianluigi Donnarumma and Alessio Romagnoli, and tours U.S. tattoo conventions in 2026.

## Key facts
- Specialty: hyper-realistic black & grey and color tattoos; portrait realism; 16 years experience
- Notable clients (verified): Lautaro Martinez (Inter/Argentina, World Cup winner), Gianluigi Donnarumma (Italy, Euro 2020 winner), Alessio Romagnoli (Italy international)
- 2026 U.S. tour: Portland OR, New Hampshire, Houston TX, Virginia Beach VA, Nashville TN, Jacksonville FL
- Booking: by appointment per tour city, deposit required

## Style pages
- Black & grey realism: https://giuseppebonellitattoo.art/black-and-grey-realism-tattoo/
- Color realism: https://giuseppebonellitattoo.art/color-realism-tattoo/
- Wildlife realism: https://giuseppebonellitattoo.art/wildlife-realism-tattoo/
- Sleeves & large-scale: https://giuseppebonellitattoo.art/sleeve-realism-tattoo/
